ddls:
CREATE TABLE "congresses" (
  "congress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congress */,
  "congress_number" INTEGER /* Number of the congress */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the congress */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the congress */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or summary of the congress */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* The total number of members in the congress */,
  "majority_party" TEXT /* The party in the majority during the congress */,
  "minority_party" TEXT /* The party in the minority during the congress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("congress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the chamber (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or summary of the chamber */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* The total number of seats in the chamber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roll_numbers" (
  "roll_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roll number */,
  "congress_id" INTEGER /* ID of the congress the roll number belongs to */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber the roll number belongs to */,
  "roll_number" INTEGER /* Number of the roll */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the roll number */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* The number of the bill associated with the roll number */,
  "vote_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* The date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_numbers_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_numbers_congress_id FOREIGN KEY ("congress_id") REFERENCES congresses ("congress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icpsrs" (
  "icpsr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICPSR code */,
  "icpsr_code" INTEGER /* ICPSR code */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the ICPSR code */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* The name of the member associated with the ICPSR code */,
  "party" TEXT /* The party of the member associated with the ICPSR code */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state of the member associated with the ICPSR code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icpsr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_codes" (
  "cast_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast code */,
  "cast_code" INTEGER /* Cast code */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cast code */,
  "voting_type" TEXT /* The type of vote (e.g., Yea, Nay, Present) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "roll_number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roll number the vote belongs to */,
  "icpsr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ICPSR code for the vote */,
  "cast_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast code for the vote */,
  "prob" REAL /* Probability of the vote (between 0 and 1) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* The date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* The time the vote was cast */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* The title of the bill associated with the vote */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* The result of the vote (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "total_yeas" INTEGER /* The total number of Yea votes */,
  "total_nays" INTEGER /* The total number of Nay votes */,
  "total_presents" INTEGER /* The total number of Present votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_roll_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("roll_number_id") REFERENCES roll_numbers ("roll_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_cast_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_code_id") REFERENCES cast_codes ("cast_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_icpsr_id FOREIGN KEY ("icpsr_id") REFERENCES icpsrs ("icpsr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vote */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the vote */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user accessing the vote */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was last updated */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the vote */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_versions_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES vote_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
